title: SphereLib
body:
# Common Library for Leralix's Plugins

SphereLib is a common Java library designed to centralize key methods from multiple projects, reducing code duplication and speeding up development

### Current uses :

- Command manager
- Sound library
- Config file auto-updater
- Common plugin version check
- Common vector handling
- GUI element creation

### Included in : 
- [Towns and Nations](https://modrinth.com/plugin/towns-nations)
- [Towns and Nations - Dynmap](https://modrinth.com/plugin/towns-and-nations-dynmap)
- [Towns and Nations - Squaremap](https://modrinth.com/plugin/towns-and-nations-squaremap)
- [Towns and Nations - Bluemap](https://modrinth.com/plugin/towns-and-nations-bluemap)
- [Exotic Trades](https://modrinth.com/plugin/exotic-trades)
- [Exotic Trades - Dynmap](https://modrinth.com/plugin/exotictrades-dynmap)
- [Exotic Trades - Squaremap](https://modrinth.com/plugin/exotictrades-squaremap)
- [Exotic Trades - Bluemap](https://modrinth.com/plugin/exotictrades-bluemap)
